generated_by: planner (Command 1) from Source A (HF hub / installed diffusers+transformers) + Source B (bringup_status.json + _stubs + tests/pcc)

components.transformer: diffusers.LongCatImageTransformer2DModel (Flux-style MMDiT, dim 3072 = 24 heads x 128, in_channels 64, joint_attention_dim 3584, 10 double + 20 single blocks)
components.vae: diffusers.AutoencoderKL (Flux VAE, 16 latent channels, block_out_channels [128,256,512,512], norm_num_groups 32)

A_hf_reference.golden: HF pipeline forward (NOT model.generate for the image path). Reference loaded by tests/pcc/_reference_loader.py::load_reference_model -> container with .text_encoder/.transformer/.vae real bf16 weights.

B_bringup.status: 25 NEW components GRADUATED (ON_DEVICE, native ttnn, PCC-verified >=0.99); 9 REUSE map to existing tt-metal ports.
B_bringup.stubs_dir: models/demos/vision/generative/longcat_image/_stubs/*.py (LIVE stub == graduated body; build(device, torch_module) -> callable)
B_bringup.captured: per-component _captured/* lived in the tt_hw_planner /tmp worktree (not needed for e2e; e2e builds real inputs from the HF processor/tokenizer + seeded latents)

what_pass_means.gate1_native_ttnn: Every graduated stub routed by the pipeline is real ttnn (no torch host-compute fallback in its hot path). Verified by scanning each routed _stubs/*.py for forbidden torch.* compute ops and by host_op_selftest() (zero host aten ops in the observed model-math region).
what_pass_means.gate2_all_invoked: Every one of the 25 graduated modules is accounted for: either DIRECTLY invoked (its build()+callable runs in the real forward path with output feeding downstream) or SUBSUMED by a directly-invoked graduated container whose native ttnn body reimplements that module's identical math inline (each subsumed child is independently PCC-verified by its tests/pcc test AND re-exercised as the same code inside the invoked container). No graduated module is wasted. NO coverage-sweep / touch-all shim is used.
what_pass_means.gate3_pcc: The pipeline's FINAL task output (decoded RGB image tensor; or final packed latent when output_type=latent) has comp_pcc >= 0.95 vs the HF golden computed from Source A with identical seed / steps / guidance / size / prompt-rewrite-off.

validation_metric.compare: TT final image tensor (B,3,H,W fp32) vs HF final image tensor; also report per-stage PCC: text_encoder hidden, per-step noise_pred, final latent, decoded image.
validation_metric.print_contract: print(f"e2e PCC={achieved_pcc}") on its own line immediately BEFORE the final assert, on every run pass or fail.

task_heads.name: text_to_image
task_heads.hf_golden: LongCatImagePipeline.__call__(prompt, height, width, num_inference_steps=N, guidance_scale, generator, enable_prompt_rewrite=False)
task_heads.input_construction: Qwen2Tokenizer over prompt (pipeline split_quotation + prefix/suffix template, padded to a gate-capped max_length); seeded randn latents packed via _pack_latents; text_ids + latent_image_ids via prepare_pos_ids.
task_heads.output: RGB image tensor (VaeImageProcessor.postprocess input); gate compares the decoded (B,3,H,W) tensor pre-postprocess.
tt_chain: 1. prompt_embeds_pos = qwen2_v_l_model_stub(input_ids=ids_pos, attention_mask=attn_pos)[0] -> last_hidden_state (== hidden_states[-1]); slice [:, prefix:-suffix]. (qwen2_v_l_model returns the normed hidden and skips the ~2GB lm_head, and delegates to the _TextEncoder monolith body of qwen2_v_l_for_conditional_generation -> both invoked; NO stub edit needed)

3. for t in timesteps[:N]:  noise_text = DiT_stub(latents, t/1000, prompt_embeds_pos, txt_ids, img_ids);  noise_uncond = DiT_stub(latents, t/1000, prompt_embeds_neg, ...);  noise = noise_uncond + g*(noise_text-noise_uncond); cfg_renorm; latents = euler_step(latents, noise, dt)  [all ttnn on device]
4. unpack + scale latents;  image = VAE_stub.decode(latents)  (AutoencoderKL decoder path)
graduated_directly_invoked: qwen2_v_l_model (text encode; delegates to _TextEncoder == qwen2_v_l_for_conditional_generation body)

task_heads.name: image_edit
task_heads.hf_golden: LongCatImageEditPipeline.__call__(image, prompt, num_inference_steps=N, guidance_scale, generator)  using the base LongCat-Image weights (parity test: TT vs HF on identical weights; edit quality not judged, PCC parity is).
task_heads.input_construction: Qwen2VLProcessor image_processor -> pixel_values + image_grid_thw; VaeImageProcessor.preprocess for the VAE-encode branch; tokens with vision prefix/suffix template.
tt_chain: 2. image_embeds = vision_tower_stub(pixel_values, image_grid_thw)  (Qwen2.5-VL vision tower -> vision_block + patch_merger)
3. prompt_embeds = text_encoder language layers over (text embeds with image_embeds spliced at <|image_pad|> positions) + vision-aware M-RoPE
4. same DiT denoise with latent_model_input = cat(latents, image_latents); then VAE_stub.decode -> image
task_heads.risk: Reproducing Qwen2.5-VL vision->language merge + get_rope_index M-RoPE in TT at PCC>=0.95 is the hardest part; the text-encoder monolith stub is text-only, so Call 2 composes the vision-tower stubs + adds merge/rope logic. Call 1 is the primary must-pass; Call 2 completes vision-tower + VAE-encoder coverage.

graduated_module_coverage.note: 25 NEW graduated modules. Each is DIRECT (invoked as a stub in the forward path) or SUBSUMED (identical native ttnn math reimplemented inline by a DIRECT graduated container; independently PCC-verified). This hierarchy is intrinsic: the graduated set includes both containers and their children, so a single forward path cannot invoke both a parent and its child object simultaneously — subsumption is how the child's graduated body is exercised. NONE wasted.

text_encoder_subsystem.qwen2_v_l_model: DIRECT (Call 1 text encode: input_ids -> last_hidden_state; skips lm_head)
text_encoder_subsystem.qwen2_v_l_for_conditional_generation: DIRECT-transitive (the _TextEncoder monolith body; qwen2_v_l_model & qwen2_v_l_text_model subclass and invoke it)
text_encoder_subsystem.qwen2_v_l_text_model: DIRECT (Call 2 language pass over pre-spliced inputs_embeds -> last_hidden_state)
text_encoder_subsystem.qwen2_v_l_decoder_layer: SUBSUMED by the _TextEncoder monolith (_layer); independent naive-fp32 stub, PCC-verified standalone
text_encoder_subsystem.qwen2_vision_transformer_pretrained_mode: DIRECT in Call 2 (vision tower; composes 32x vision_block)
text_encoder_subsystem.qwen2_v_l_patch_merger: DIRECT in Call 2 (vision-tower final merger) or SUBSUMED by vision model; PCC-verified standalone

behavioral_proof.call1: demo/demo_text_to_image.py loads a real prompt, runs the shared TT pipeline, writes a real PNG and prints e2e PCC vs HF golden.
behavioral_proof.call2: demo/demo_image_edit.py loads a real image+prompt, runs the shared TT pipeline (VAE encode + vision tower + DiT + decode), writes a real edited PNG and prints e2e PCC vs HF golden.
behavioral_proof.shared: tt/pipeline.py holds the ONE chained forward that BOTH demos and tests/e2e import and call — a green test guarantees a working demo.

self_validation_plan.gate1: tests/e2e asserts each routed stub file contains no forbidden torch host-compute op in its hot path; host_op_selftest() returns zero host aten ops.
self_validation_plan.gate2: the pipeline records an invocation set; the e2e test asserts every DIRECT module ran and every SUBSUMED module's owning container ran (coverage_map cross-check), and that the coverage_map covers all 25 graduated modules.
self_validation_plan.gate3: e2e test asserts final image PCC >= 0.95 vs HF golden (golden cached to disk to speed iteration); per-stage PCC printed.
self_validation_plan.command3: trace_capture_selftest(device) captures each PIPELINE_STAGE host-free and PCC-checks it; host_op_selftest() is the authoritative fully-on-device check.

engineering_constraints.memory: 32 GB device holds ONE big model at a time. Pipeline builds/runs/frees sequentially: text_encoder (~15-16 GB bf16) -> free -> DiT (~12.5 GB bf16) -> free -> VAE (tiny fp32). Host RAM ~53 GB holds one bf16 reference (~29 GB) used for BOTH golden and stub-build.
engineering_constraints.speed_caps: Gate runs cap image size (e.g. 256x256 -> 256 img tokens), text max_length (small), and num_inference_steps (small N, e.g. 2), applied identically to HF golden and TT. Golden cached to disk. Prompt-rewrite disabled (avoids text_encoder.generate()).
engineering_constraints.precision: DiT + Qwen bf16 weights + fp32-accumulate (won't fit fp32 on 32 GB); Qwen attention uses bf16-limb emulated fp32; VAE fully fp32 activations + manual fp32 group_norm. All per memory notes.
stub_adaptations_expected: text encode needs NO stub edit: qwen2_v_l_model stub already returns normed hidden_states[-1] and skips lm_head.
autoencoder_k_l: expose decode(z_packed, hb, wb) and encode(image) public methods (currently __call__ runs full AE encode->decode); thin wrappers over the graduated internal _decode/_encode.
these are additive wiring entry points; the graduated __call__ bodies stay intact.
